title: AG says auditor can hire attorney to force audit of Legislature after SJC order
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: AG Campbell allows Auditor DiZoglio to hire an attorney for Legislature audit following Supreme Judicial Court's directive.
DiZoglio focuses on four Senate-related financial areas, complying with SJC mandate for a narrowed audit scope.
Shannon Liss-Riordan to represent DiZoglio's audit case in court; audit seeks Senate budgets, audits, transactions, and agreements.

title: Kyle Schwarber reveals tepid pursuit from Red Sox this past offseason
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Kyle Schwarber signed a five-year, $150 million contract with the Phillies in December 2025.
Boston Red Sox's offseason interest in Kyle Schwarber was limited to brief contract discussions.
Schwarber has hit 204 home runs with the Phillies, including 17 in the current MLB season.

title: Jayson Tatum reveals new goal he’s chasing with the Celtics
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Jayson Tatum aims for another Celtics championship and NBA Finals MVP in the 2026-27 season.
Tatum seeks a fresh start after recovering from a ruptured Achilles and knee soreness limited his 2025-26 performance.
Tatum expressed confidence in returning to high-level play post-injury, focusing on a regular training offseason.

title: 7 contracts Bruins might try to unload this offseason
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: The Boston Bruins aim to clear cap space by potentially trading players like Joonas Korpisalo, freeing up $3 million per year.
Defenseman Henri Jokiharju's $3 million contract might be moved due to inconsistent performance and reduced game appearances.
Bruins consider trading Elias Lindholm's $7.75 million contract due to limited production and injury concerns, despite a no-movement clause.

title: First white shark sighting of 2026 confirmed off Massachusetts coast
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: The first white shark sighting of 2026 in Massachusetts was confirmed after a dead gray seal was found with bite wounds on Martha's Vineyard.
John Chisholm, an Aquarium scientist, verified the seal's wounds as consistent with a white shark, marking the season's commencement.
Beachgoers are advised to avoid seal areas and stay informed through the Sharktivity app to track shark sightings and activity.

title: 10 stats to help contextualize the Red Sox’ rocky start
author: Trevor Hass
bullets: The Boston Red Sox are struggling, with a record of 17-24 and ranked 29th in MLB for home runs.
The team is 0-21 when trailing after seven innings and 3-17 when opponents score first.
Despite the poor start, the Red Sox lead MLB in defensive runs saved with 41 and have the most shutouts.

title: Want to own a piece of Dunkin’? Its parent company may go public.
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Inspire Brands plans to go public, marking Dunkin's third stock market entry in eight decades.
The Atlanta-based parent company has filed confidentially with the SEC for an initial public offering.
Funding from the IPO will help Inspire Brands repay debt incurred from its acquisition of Dunkin'.

title: Trooper who helped take down Memorial Drive gunman identified as victims’ families speak out
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Trooper Landon Veney helped subdue gunman Tyler Brown during a shooting on Memorial Drive in Cambridge.
Tyler Brown faces charges including armed assault with intent to murder after injuring two men.
Victims included a 62-year-old MBTA driver and 35-year-old DoorDash driver, both expected to survive.

title: A new grocery store is coming to the Seaport
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Whole Foods Market will open a smaller-format Daily Shop at 111 Harbor Way, Seaport, Boston.
The Daily Shop offers a curated selection, including fresh produce, prepared foods, and grab-and-go options.
Whole Foods plans to open more Daily Shops in Chicago, Philadelphia, and other locations in 2026.

title: Travelers can now get real-time security checkpoint wait times at Logan Airport
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Logan Airport introduces real-time security checkpoint wait times accessible via its website and FlyLogan app.
Massport collaborates with vendor to use camera technology for monitoring security lines without recording personal details.
The initiative is part of Massport's efforts to improve customer experience, following Logan's ranking in J.D. Power study.
